title: Marathon Prep Bot
tagline: The training dashboard I wanted while getting ready for a marathon
summary: I wanted one place that could remember my training, put each workout in context, and help me tell whether I was actually improving. So I built it around my own workout history.
outcome: More than 1,300 workouts now feed a private coaching system and a public dashboard that stays useful without sharing the sensitive parts of my health data.
role: Solo builder and the runner using it every week
proofPoints: More than 1,300 workouts processed across history going back to 2022
HealthFit exports become privacy-safe dashboard updates automatically
Every seven-day plan is checked before it reaches the site
